scripts.build: esbuild app.jsx icons.jsx components/shared.jsx components/about.jsx components/publications.jsx components/news.jsx --outdir=dist --loader:.jsx=jsx --jsx=transform --jsx-factory=React.createElement --jsx-fragment=React.Fragment --target=es2020 --minify
scripts.watch: esbuild app.jsx icons.jsx components/shared.jsx components/about.jsx components/publications.jsx components/news.jsx --outdir=dist --loader:.jsx=jsx --jsx=transform --jsx-factory=React.createElement --jsx-fragment=React.Fragment --target=es2020 --watch
